the.notes: Attached as prefix (הַ) to the following noun

created.notes: Divine creation — only God can 'bara'. Qal perfect, 3rd person masculine singular.

God.notes: Plural form used as singular — indicates divine majesty and fullness of power

god.notes: Plural form used as singular — indicates divine majesty and fullness of power

heavens.notes: Heavenly realm; always plural in Hebrew

the heavens.notes: Heavenly realm; always plural in Hebrew

and.notes: Waw conjunctive — connects words and clauses

earth.notes: Physical earth or land; context determines scope

the earth.notes: Physical earth; definite article הָ attached
